name: directory layout: `_operator/`, `_community/`, `_meta/` tier folders are present alongside but separate from the 14 default source-namespace folders per §17 tiering
command: root="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"; for tier in _operator _community _meta; do test -d "$root/$tier" || { echo "FAIL missing tier $tier" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; defaults='google us-government european-union finance-industry owasp w3c web-vitals react node typescript slsa linux-foundation industry-self-regulatory _universal'; for tier in _operator _community _meta; do echo "$defaults" | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx "$tier" && { echo "FAIL tier $tier should not be in the 14-default list" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
